_comment: Template for the session.update event the bridge sends as the first message on the Voice Live WebSocket. The bridge substitutes ${INSTRUCTIONS}, ${VOICE_NAME}, and ${MCS_AGENT_NAME} at runtime. Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/ai-services/speech-service/voice-live-how-to

tools.name: ask_microsoft_learn_assistant
tools.description: Forward the user's question to the '${MCS_AGENT_NAME}' Copilot Studio agent, which is grounded in Microsoft Learn documentation via the Microsoft Learn MCP server. ALWAYS call this for any factual Microsoft product, IT, or how-to question. Returns a plain-text answer.

question.description: The user's question, rephrased as a clear, standalone English sentence (include any context needed for a fresh reader).
